seo.title: About Us — Interior Design Since 1942
seo.description: Established in 1942 in the heart of the Cotswolds, Savery's has been creating exceptional interiors for discerning clients across the UK for over 30 years. Broadway, Ludlow and Chelsea.

paragraphs: Savery's was established in 1942 by a family with a deep love of beautiful things — not for the sake of beauty alone, but for the quiet comfort it brings to daily life.

Over three decades, the studio has cultivated a philosophy of restraint. We do not follow trends. We listen — to the architecture, to the light, to the people who will live within the spaces we shape.

Based in the village of Broadway in the Cotswolds, our studio sits within one of England's most cherished landscapes — a place that reminds us, daily, of the value of things made well and built to last.

steps.title: Listen
steps.description: Every project begins with listening. We take time to understand not just the brief, but the rhythms and rituals of the people who will inhabit the space.

steps.title: Compose
steps.description: We compose schemes with the care of a curator — balancing colour, texture and form until the room feels inevitable, not designed.

steps.title: Craft
steps.description: We work with the finest makers and craftspeople, ensuring every detail is executed with precision and care.
